title: Local project onboarding
summary: Implement read-only latest-source diagnosis and structured safe local project onboarding for non-Git project directories. Include tests for stale registered path, richer sibling source, sensitive path denial, and idempotency.
goals: Implement read-only latest-source diagnosis and structured safe local project onboarding for non-Git project directories. Include tests for stale registered path, richer sibling source, sensitive path denial, and idempotency.
nonGoals: Do not make unrelated changes outside the declared Task scope.
acceptanceCriteria: Complete: Implement read-only latest-source diagnosis and structured safe local project onboarding for non-Git project directories. Include tests for stale registered path, richer sibling source, sensitive path denial, and idempotency.
